entities.name: REVIEW.md
entities.context: Generated review document for inbox files with confidence levels and TTL warnings

entities.name: Inbox Review System
entities.context: Process that analyzes unrouted files and generates structured review documents

entities.name: Confidence Levels
entities.context: Classification system using percentages: high (≥85%), medium (60-84%), low (<60%)

entities.name: TTL (Time To Live)
entities.context: 14-day threshold for flagging stale inbox items

entities.name: Auto-routing
entities.context: Automatic file routing for high-confidence items without manual intervention

entities.name: Analysis Log
entities.context: Input file used to generate reviews; creates warning if missing

relationships.context: System generates REVIEW.md as its output artifact
System categorizes files by confidence percentage thresholds
System flags files exceeding 14-day TTL threshold
Auto-routing triggers only for files with ≥85% confidence
System reads analysis log as input; warns if missing
